spec:
# Component Specification: Add Expense Screen
### CashPulse — Screen 2 | Version 1.0 | UX Planning Agent Output

---

## 1. Component Tree

```
<AddExpenseScreen>
│
├── <ScreenHeader>
│   ├── <BackButton />                        # Icon button, navigates to Dashboard
│   └── <ScreenTitle />                       # "Add Expense" | "Edit Expense" (edit mode)
│
├── <ScrollContainer>                         # Single-column, centered, max-width 520px
│   │
│   ├── <AmountInputSection>                  # Hero block — auto-focused on mount
│   │   ├── <SectionLabel />                  # "Amount" — heading-2
│   │   ├── <AmountInput>                     # Borderless hero input
│   │   │   ├── <CurrencySymbol />            # "$" prefix, display weight
│   │   │   ├── <NumericInput />              # inputmode="decimal", 32px DM Sans 700
│   │   │   └── <FocusUnderline />            # 2px line, slate-border → gold-amber
│   │   └── <AmountCapWarning />              # amber caption, aria-live="polite", hidden until $99,999.99
│   │
│   ├── <CategorySelectorSection>
│   │   ├── <SectionLabel />                  # "Category" — heading-2
│   │   ├── <CategoryChipGrid>                # role="radiogroup", 3-col grid
│   │   │   └── <CategoryChip />              # ×6 default; role="radio", aria-pressed
│   │   │       ├── <ChipColorDot />          # Category color indicator
│   │   │       └── <ChipLabel />             # Category name, truncates with ellipsis
│   │   ├── <NewCategoryTrigger />            # "+ New Category" text link, 44px hit area
│   │   └── <NewCategoryInlineForm>           # Slide-down expansion, hidden by default
│   │       ├── <CategoryNameInput />         # text input, min 1 char to enable save
│   │       ├── <ColorPickerRow>              # 6 color circle options
│   │       │   └── <ColorSwatch />           # ×6, 28px circles, radio behavior
│   │       ├── <DuplicateNameError />        # coral-error caption, conditional
│   │       └── <SaveNewCategoryButton />     # Mini CTA, disabled until name ≥ 1 char
│   │
│   ├── <DatePickerSection>
│   │   ├── <SectionLabel />                  # "Date" — heading-2
│   │   ├── <DateRowTrigger>                  # Full-width row, 44px height
│   │   │   ├── <CalendarIcon />              # aria-hidden
│   │   │   └── <DateDisplayText />           # "Today, March 29, 2026" format
│   │   └── <MiniCalendarDropdown>            # 280px, elevation level-2, z-index: 1000
│   │       ├── <CalendarHeader>
│   │       │   ├── <PrevMonthButton />       # chevron-left, 44×44px
│   │       │   ├── <MonthYearLabel />        # "March 2026", heading-2
│   │       │   └── <NextMonthButton />       # chevron-right, 44×44px
│   │       ├── <WeekdayHeaderRow />           # "Su Mo Tu We Th Fr Sa"
│   │       └── <CalendarDayGrid>             # 7-col grid
│   │           └── <CalendarDayCell />       # ×28–31; states: default/hover/today/selected/disabled
│   │
│   ├── <PaymentMethodSection>
│   │   ├── <SectionLabel />                  # "Payment Method" — heading-2
│   │   └── <PaymentMethodChipRow>            # role="radiogroup", horizontal, scroll on narrow
│   │       └── <PaymentMethodChip />         # ×4; role="radio"; icon + label; 44px min-height
│   │           ├── <PaymentIcon />           # emoji/icon, aria-hidden
│   │           └── <PaymentLabel />          # "Debit Card" / "Credit Card" / "Cash" / "Other"
│   │
│   ├── <NoteInputSection>
│   │   ├── <SectionLabel />                  # "Note (optional)" — heading-2
│   │   ├── <NoteTextInput />                 # single-line, 44px height, max 100 chars
│   │   └── <CharacterCounter />             # hidden until 80+ chars; coral-error at 95+
│   │
│   ├── <SaveCTAButton />                     # Full-width, 52px; aria-disabled when inactive
│   │                                         # Label: "Save Expense" | "Save Changes" (edit mode)
│   │
│   └── <QuickAddSection>                     # Hidden when no frequent-expense data
│       ├── <SectionLabel />                  # "Quick Add" — heading-2; de-emphasized in edit mode
│       └── <QuickAddChipRow>                 # Horizontally scrollable
│           └── <QuickAddChip />              # ×3–4; emoji + merchant + amount; 44px min-height
```

---

## 2. Layout Rules

### 2.1 Page Structure

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  <ScreenHeader>                    full-width│
│  height: 56px | padding: 0 16px             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                             │
│    ┌───────────────────────────────┐        │
│    │    <ScrollContainer>          │        │
│    │    max-width: 520px           │        │
│    │    margin: 0 auto             │        │
│    │    padding: 24px 24px 48px    │        │
│    │                               │        │
│    │  [AmountInputSection]         │        │
│    │  margin-bottom: 32px          │        │
│    │                               │        │
│    │  [CategorySelectorSection]    │        │
│    │  margin-bottom: 24px          │        │
│    │                               │        │
│    │  [DatePickerSection]          │        │
│    │  margin-bottom: 24px          │        │
│    │                               │        │
│    │  [PaymentMethodSection]       │        │
│    │  margin-bottom: 24px          │        │
│    │                               │        │
│    │  [NoteInputSection]           │        │
│    │  margin-bottom: 32px          │        │
│    │                               │        │
│    │  [SaveCTAButton]              │        │
│    │  margin-bottom: 32px          │        │
│    │                               │        │
│    │  [QuickAddSection]            │        │
│    │  margin-bottom: 24px          │        │
│    └───────────────────────────────┘        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 2.2 Section Layout Rules

#### `<ScreenHeader>`
- `display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center`
- Background: `surface-primary` (#1E293B)
- Bottom border: 1px `slate-border`
- `<BackButton>`: 44×44px, left-aligned
- `<ScreenTitle>`: center-aligned, `heading-2`, `silver-text`

#### `<AmountInputSection>`
- `text-align: center`
- `<CurrencySymbol>` + `<NumericInput>` inline, same baseline
- `font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; font-family: DM Sans`
- `font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums` on `<NumericInput>`
- `<FocusUnderline>`: `width: 120px; margin: 8px auto 0`
- `<AmountCapWarning>`: `margin-top: 8px; font-size: 12px`

#### `<CategoryChipGrid>`
- `display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 8px`
- Each `<CategoryChip>`: `min-height: 44px; border-radius: 10px; padding: 0 12px`
- `display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px`
- Selected state: category-color border 1.5px + category-color at 10% opacity background

#### `<NewCategoryInlineForm>`
- `margin-top: 12px; padding: 16px`
- Background: `surface-elevated` (#293548)
- `border-radius: 10px`
- `<ColorPickerRow>`: `display: flex; gap: 8px; margin: 12px 0`
- `<ColorSwatch>`: 28×28px circles, `border-radius: pill`
- Slide-down: `max-height: 0 → 200px; overflow: hidden; transition: 200ms ease`

#### `<DateRowTrigger>`
- `display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px`
- `height: 44px; padding: 0 16px`
- Background: `surface-elevated`; `border-radius: 10px`
- `border: 1px solid slate-border`

#### `<MiniCalendarDropdown>`
- `width: 280px; padding: 16px`
- `border-radius: 16px`
- Background: `surface-elevated`
- `box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)` (elevation level-2)
- Positioned below `<DateRowTrigger>`, left-aligned within column
- `<CalendarDayGrid>`: `display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr); gap: 4px`
- `<CalendarDayCell>`: `min-height: 40px; min-width: 40px; border-radius: 6px`

#### `<PaymentMethodChipRow>`
- `display: flex; flex-direction: row; gap: 8px`
- `overflow-x: auto; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch`
- `scrollbar-width: none`
- Each chip: `flex-shrink: 0; height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: pill`

#### `<NoteTextInput>`
- `width: 100%; height: 44px; padding: 0 16px`
- `border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid slate-border`
- `transition: border-color 150ms`

#### `<SaveCTAButton>`
- `width: 100%; height: 52px; border-radius: 10px`
- `font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600`

#### `<QuickAddChipRow>`
- `display: flex; flex-direction: row; gap: 8px`
- `overflow-x: auto; padding-bottom: 4px`
- `scrollbar-width: none`
- Each `<QuickAddChip>`: `flex-shrink: 0; height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: pill`

---

## 3. Token Bindings

### 3.1 Color Tokens

| Component | Property | Token | Resolved Value |
|---|---|---|---|
| Page background | `background` | `background-primary` | #0F172A |
| ScreenHeader, all cards | `background` | `surface-primary` | #1E293B |
| NewCategoryForm, DateRow, NoteInput | `background` | `surface-elevated` | #293548 |
| ScreenTitle, SectionLabels, FilledText | `color` | `text-primary` | #CBD5E1 |
| Placeholder text, DateDefault, SecondaryLabel | `color` | `text-secondary` | #64748B |
| Amount input placeholder "0.00" | `color` | `text-secondary` | #64748B |
| All borders (default) | `border-color` | `border-default` | #334155 |
| Focus rings (all interactive) | `border-color` / `outline-color` | `border-focus` | #F59E0B |
| AmountCapWarning | `color` | `warning` | #F59E0B |
| DuplicateNameError, CharCounter at 95+ | `color` | `error` | #F87171 |
| CharCounter at 80–94 | `color` | `text-secondary` | #64748B |
| AmountUnderline (focused) | `border-color` | `border-focus` | #F59E0B |
| AmountUnderline (default) | `border-color` | `border-default` | #334155 |
| CategoryChip selected border | `border-color` | category-specific color | per category |
| CategoryChip selected bg | `background` | category-color + 10% opacity | `opacity.subtle` |
| PaymentMethodChip selected text + icon | `color` | `cta-primary` | #F59E0B |
| PaymentMethodChip selected border | `border-color` | `cta-primary` | #F59E0B |
| SaveCTA (active) | `background` | `cta-primary` | #F59E0B |
| SaveCTA (active) | `color` | `text-on-cta` | #0F172A |
| SaveCTA (hover) | `background` | `cta-hover` | #D97706 |
| SaveCTA (disabled) | `background` | `border-default` | #334155 |
| SaveCTA (disabled) | `color` | `text-disabled` | #64748B |
| SaveCTA (success) | `background` | `success` | #14B8A6 |
| SaveCTA (success) | `color` | `text-on-cta` | #0F172A |
| QuickAddChip | `background` | `surface-elevated` | #293548 |
| QuickAddChip (hover) | `background` | `surface-elevated` + hover overlay | +8% opacity |
| QuickAddSection (edit mode) | `opacity` | `opacity.muted` | 0.3 |
| CalendarDayCell (today) | `border` | `cta-primary` 1px | #F59E0B |
| CalendarDayCell (selected) | `background` | `cta-primary` | #F59E0B |
| CalendarDayCell (selected text) | `color` | `text-on-cta` | #0F172A |
| CalendarDayCell (disabled/future) | `color` | `text-disabled` | #64748B |
| MiniCalendarDropdown | `background` | `surface-elevated` | #293548 |
| MiniCalendarDropdown | `box-shadow` | elevation level-2 | 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4) |

### 3.2 Typography Tokens

| Component | Token Role | Family | Size | Weight |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ScreenTitle | `heading-2` | DM Sans | 16px | 600 |
| SectionLabel (all sections) | `heading-2` | DM Sans | 16px | 600 |
| AmountInput (hero number) | Custom — `display` | DM Sans | 32px | 700 |
| CurrencySymbol | Custom — `display` | DM Sans | 24px | 700 |
| CategoryChip label | `body` | DM Mono | 14px | 400 |
| DateDisplayText | `body` | DM Mono | 14px | 400 |
| PaymentMethodChip label | `body` | DM Mono | 14px | 400 |
| NoteInput (value + placeholder) | `body` | DM Mono | 14px | 400 |
| QuickAddChip label | `body` | DM Mono | 14px | 400 |
| WeekdayHeaderRow | `label` | DM Mono | 12px | 500 |
| CalendarDayCell | `label` | DM Mono | 12px | 500 |
| MonthYearLabel | `heading-2` | DM Sans | 16px | 600 |
| AmountCapWarning | `label` | DM Mono | 12px | 500 |
| CharacterCounter | `label` | DM Mono | 12px | 500 |
| DuplicateNameError | `label` | DM Mono | 12px | 500 |
| SaveCTA label | `heading-2` | DM Sans | 16px | 600 |
| NewCategoryTrigger link | `label` | DM Mono | 12px | 500 |

### 3.3 Spacing Tokens

| Component / Usage | Value | Token Unit |
|---|---|---|
| ScrollContainer padding (top) | 24px | `spacing.24` |
| ScrollContainer padding (horizontal) | 24px | `spacing.24` |
| ScrollContainer padding (bottom) | 48px | `spacing.48` |
| Between major sections (default) | 24px | `spacing.24` |
| AmountInputSection bottom margin | 32px | `spacing.32` |
| NoteSection → SaveCTA bottom margin | 32px | `spacing.32` |
| CategoryChipGrid gap | 8px | `spacing.8` |
| PaymentChip row gap | 8px | `spacing.8` |
| QuickAddChip row gap | 8px | `spacing.8` |
| SectionLabel → content gap | 12px | `spacing.12` |
| Chip internal padding (horizontal) | 12–16px | `spacing.12 / spacing.16` |
| CalendarDayGrid cell gap | 4px | `spacing.4` |
| CalendarDropdown internal padding | 16px | `spacing.16` |
| NewCategoryForm internal padding | 16px | `spacing.16` |
| ColorPickerRow top/bottom margin | 12px | `spacing.12` |
| AmountUnderline top margin | 8px | `spacing.8` |
| AmountCapWarning top margin | 8px | `spacing.8` |

### 3.4 Border Radius Tokens

| Component | Token | Value |
|---|---|---|
| CategoryChip | `radius.medium` | 10px |
| NewCategoryInlineForm | `radius.medium` | 10px |
| DateRowTrigger | `radius.medium` | 10px |
| NoteTextInput | `radius.medium` | 10px |
| SaveCTAButton | `radius.medium` | 10px |
| MiniCalendarDropdown | `radius.large` | 16px |
| CalendarDayCell | `radius.small` | 6px |
| PaymentMethodChip | `radius.pill` | 9999px |
| QuickAddChip | `radius.pill` | 9999px |
| ColorSwatch | `radius.pill` | 9999px |
| ScreenHeader | none | 0 |

### 3.5 Motion Tokens

| Interaction | Duration Token | Easing | Reduced-Motion Fallback |
|---|---|---|---|
| AmountInput underline color transition | `fast` (150ms) | `default` | Instant |
| CategoryChip selection scale-bounce (1.05 → 1.0) | `fast` (150ms) | `emphasized` | Instant, no scale |
| NewCategoryForm slide-down | `normal` (300ms) → use 200ms custom | `default` | Instant show/hide |
| CalendarDropdown fade in/out | `fast` (150ms) | `default` | Instant show/hide |
| PaymentMethodChip selection transition | `fast` (150ms) | `default` | Instant |
| SaveCTA disabled ↔ active transition | `fast` (150ms) | `default` | Instant |
| SaveCTA success state (gold → teal) | `slow` (400ms custom) | `default` | Instant |
| SaveCTA press scale (1.0 → 0.98) | `fast` (150ms) | `emphasized` | Instant |
| QuickAdd cascade field population (50ms/field) | staggered `fast` | `default` | Simultaneous |
| Screen exit transition | 350ms custom | `emphasized` | Instant cut |

### 3.6 Elevation Tokens

| Component | Level | Shadow |
|---|---|---|
| Form cards / surface blocks | level-1 | `0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)` |
| MiniCalendarDropdown | level-2 | `0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)` |
| NewCategoryInlineForm | level-1 | `0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)` |

### 3.7 Focus Ring Tokens

All interactive elements:
```
outline: 2px solid token(border-focus)   /* #F59E0B */
outline-offset: 2px
border-radius: inherited from element
```

Z-index assignments:
- `MiniCalendarDropdown`: `z-index: 1000` (dropdown layer)
- `ScreenHeader`: `z-index: 1100` (sticky layer)

---

## 4. Responsive Breakpoints

### 4.1 Breakpoint Definitions

| Name | Token | Value |
|---|---|---|
| `mobile` | `breakpoints.mobile` | 640px |
| `tablet` | `breakpoints.tablet` | 768px |
| `desktop` | `breakpoints.desktop` | 1024px |
| `wide` | `breakpoints.wide` | 1440px |

### 4.2 Layout Adaptation per Breakpoint

#### `< 400px` (Small Mobile — subrange of mobile)
| Component | Behavior |
|---|---|
| `ScrollContainer` | `padding: 16px 16px 48px; width: 100%` |
| `CategoryChipGrid` | Collapses to `grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr)` — prevents label truncation |
| `PaymentMethodChipRow` | Horizontal scroll enabled; chip labels may clip — icons remain visible |
| `QuickAddChipRow` | Horizontal scroll; chips remain full height 44px |
| `MiniCalendarDropdown` | `width: 100%; left: 0` — full width of column |
| `AmountInput` | `font-size: 28px` (reduced from 32px to prevent overflow) |

#### `400px – 639px` (Standard Mobile)
| Component | Behavior |
|---|---|
| `ScrollContainer` | `padding: 20px 20px 48px; width: 100%` |
| `CategoryChipGrid` | `grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr)` — standard 3-col |
| `PaymentMethodChipRow` | Horizontal scroll if 4 chips exceed width |
| `MiniCalendarDropdown` | `width: 280px` or constrained to column width |
| `AmountInput` | `font-size: 32px` — standard |
| `SaveCTAButton` | Full-width, `height: 52px` |

#### `640px – 767px` (Large Mobile / tablet-small)
| Component | Behavior |
|---|---|
| `ScrollContainer` | `max-width: 520px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px 24px 48px` |
| `CategoryChipGrid` | `grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr)` — standard |
| `PaymentMethodChipRow` | All 4 chips visible inline without scroll |
| `MiniCalendarDropdown` | `width: 280px` — fits within column |
| All sections | Standard spacing scale applies |

#### `768px – 1023px` (Tablet)
| Component | Behavior |
|---|---|
| `ScrollContainer` | `max-width: 520px; margin: 0 auto` centered |
| `ScreenHeader` | Full viewport width; title center-aligned |
| Outer whitespace | `calc((100vw - 520px) / 2)` auto margins |
| `PaymentMethodChipRow` | May wrap to `2×2` grid if viewport forces column narrower than 520px: `flex-wrap: wrap` |
| `QuickAddSection` | Standard horizontal scroll |
| Category grid (7+ categories) | 3-col grid becomes vertically scrollable, `max-height: 3 rows` with scroll indicator |

#### `1024px – 1439px` (Desktop)
| Component | Behavior |
|---|---|
| `ScrollContainer` | `max-width: 520px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 32px 24px 64px` |
| `ScreenHeader` | Full viewport width, standard height 56px |
| All form sections | Standard layout; hover states active |
| `MiniCalendarDropdown` | `width: 280px` — no overflow risk |
| Outer whitespace | Substantial — design remains content-focused |

#### `> 1440px` (Wide)
| Component | Behavior |
|---|---|
| `ScrollContainer` | `max-width: 520px; margin: 0 auto` — column width locked |
| Outer whitespace | Expands to fill remaining viewport |
| All components | Identical to desktop; no layout changes |

### 4.3 Breakpoint Decision Matrix

```
Viewport Width →    <400px    400–639px    640–767px    768–1023px    1024–1439px    >1440px
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ScrollContainer     100%      100%         520px max    520px max     520px max      520px max
Outer padding       16px      20px         24px         auto margin   auto margin    auto margin
CategoryGrid cols   2         3            3            3             3              3
AmountInput size    28px      32px         32px         32px          32px           32px
PaymentChips        h-scroll  h-scroll     inline-4     inline-4      inline-4       inline-4
CalendarWidth       100%      280px        280px        280px         280px          280px
QuickAddChips       h-scroll  h-scroll     h-scroll     h-scroll      h-scroll       h-scroll
ScrollContainer pad 16px h    20px h       24px h       24px h        24px h         24px h
```

---

## 5. Component State Specifications

### 5.1 `<AmountInput>` State Matrix

| State | Visual Treatment | Token Binding |
|---|---|---|
| Default | Placeholder "0.00", no underline visible | `text-secondary` (#64748B) |
| Focused | Gold underline appears, cursor active | `border-focus` (#F59E0B); underline 2px |
| Filled (valid) | Number rendered in `text-primary` | `silver-text` (#CBD5E1) |
| Cap Warning | Amber caption below, non-blocking | `warning` (#F59E0B) |

### 5.2 `<CategoryChip>` State Matrix

| State | Visual Treatment | Token Binding |
|---|---|---|
| Default | `surface-elevated` bg, `slate-border` border | `border-default` |
| Hover | Slight brightness increase (+8% overlay) | `hover_opacity: 0.08` |
| Focused | 2px gold focus ring, 2px offset | `border-focus` |
| Selected | Category-color border 1.5px + bg 10% tint + scale 1.05→1.0 | `opacity.subtle: 0.1` |

### 5.3 `<SaveCTAButton>` State Matrix

| State | Background | Text | Condition |
|---|---|---|---|
| Disabled | `border-default` (#334155) | `text-disabled` (#64748B) | amount=0 OR no category |
| Active | `cta-primary` (#F59E0B) | `text-on-cta` (#0F172A) | amount>0 AND category selected |
| Hover | `cta-hover` (#D97706) | `text-on-cta` (#0F172A) | Active + hover |
| Pressed | Active + `scale(0.98)` | — | Active + press |
| Success | `success` (#14B8A6) | `text-on-cta` (#0F172A) + "✓ Saved!" | Post-valid submit (400ms) |

---

## 6. Accessibility Annotations

### 6.1 ARIA Roles & Structure

```
<main aria-label="Add Expense Form">
  <section aria-labelledby="amount-label">
  <fieldset aria-labelledby="category-label">   role="radiogroup"
  <fieldset aria-labelledby="date-label">
  <fieldset aria-labelledby="payment-label">    role="radiogroup"
  <section aria-labelledby="note-label">
  <section aria-label="Quick Add Suggestions">
```

### 6.2 Live Region Assignments

| Region | `aria-live` Level | Trigger |
|---|---|---|
| AmountCapWarning | `polite` | Amount reaches $99,999.99 |
| DateDisplayText | `polite` | Date selection changes |
| CategorySelection feedback | `polite` | Chip selected |
| DuplicateNameError | `assertive` | Duplicate name on save attempt |
| SaveSuccess message | `assertive` | Successful save |
| QuickAddPopulated | `polite` | Quick Add chip tapped |

### 6.3 Touch Target Compliance Summary

| Component | Target Size | Compliance |
|---|---|---|
| CategoryChip | flexible × 44px min-height | ✓ |
| DateRowTrigger | full-width × 44px | ✓ |
| PaymentMethodChip | flexible × 44px | ✓ |
| NoteTextInput | full-width × 44px | ✓ |
| SaveCTAButton | full-width × 52px | ✓ |
| QuickAddChip | flexible × 44px | ✓ (upgraded from 36px) |
| CalendarDayCell | 40×40px min | ✓ (upgraded from 36×36px) |
| NewCategoryTrigger | full-width × 44px via padding | ✓ |
| BackButton | 44×44px | ✓ |
| ColorSwatch | 44×44px hit area (28px visual) | ✓ |

---

## 7. Edit Mode Specification

### 7.1 Edit Mode Overrides

| Element | Add Mode | Edit Mode |
|---|---|---|
| `ScreenTitle` | "Add Expense" | "Edit Expense" |
| `SaveCTAButton` label | "Save Expense" | "Save Changes" |
| All form fields | Empty / defaults | Pre-filled with existing data |
| `QuickAddSection` opacity | 100% | `opacity.muted` (0.3) |
| Analytics event | `expense_saved` with `is_edit: false` | `expense_saved` with `is_edit: true` |

### 7.2 Pre-fill Field Mapping

| Field | Data Source |
|---|---|
| `AmountInput` | `expense.amount` |
| `CategoryChip` | `expense.categoryId` → auto-selects matching chip |
| `DateRowTrigger` | `expense.date` → calendar shows that date |
| `PaymentMethodChip` | `expense.paymentMethod` → auto-selects matching chip |
| `NoteTextInput` | `expense.note` (empty string if null) |

---

*Component Specification prepared by UX Planning Agent | CashPulse v1.0 | Screen 2: Add Expense*
